$comment: GENERATED by contracts/codegen/generate.py from station.schema.yaml - DO NOT EDIT.
description: A registered, site-scoped capture station — the collision-safe registry (global identity = site_id + station_id).

label.description: Optional human label for the start-of-day visual layout (e.g. "fold table, by window").

registered_at.description: When the station was registered (the start of its validity).

retired_at.description: When retired; null = active. The retire marker — a retired (site_id, station_id) is NEVER re-issued (allocation-side).

site_id.description: Scopes station_id (also on the card, provenance.site_id). GLOBAL identity = (site_id, station_id) — a cross-record property.

station_id.description: The per-site station number AS A STRING (the value the card carries; the anchor). Site-scoped — never globally unique alone.

status.description: Lifecycle state — OPEN string, WARN-checked vs {active, retired} (OQ-A; retire-not-reuse). NOT a hard enum.

title: Station
